text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back after a day out, Nice Nature
seems like she has something to say. I decide to
ask her about it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, actually... I'm gonna head over to the training
tracks.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I have plans or anything. I just want
to go practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that her mother is coming to see her run,
Nice Nature is extra motivated.
choice_data_list: You have to show your mom your best!
You have to show your mom your best!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I-it's nothing like that. I just feel like training is
all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Even I get the urge to just go out and run
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She turns to leave, but I stop her and tell her that
I'll supervise her extra training.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh? You're here to practice too, Nature?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Something like that. I've been slacking a little
lately.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, are you down for some partner
running? I'm getting bored of flying solo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Partner running, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: If my trainer is okay with it, I don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thanks, Nature! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All righty. Go ahead and get ready. I'll be right
behind you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll wait for you there!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You thought I'd say no, didn't you?
choice_data_list: I think it'll be good practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that there's actually a lot she can learn
from Mayano Top Gun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Besides, with her mother coming, we should use
whatever we can to get ready.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. I knew you would say that.
choice_data_list: You were thinking the same, then?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, a little, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Maybe a certain trainer I know is starting to rub
off on me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Nice Nature takes off with Mayano
Top Gun...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And manages to finish at the exact same time as
her running partner!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I hope so, at least.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is exceptionally talented, so if
Nice Nature is able to keep pace with her, I
expect she'll gain some confidence.
choice_data_list:
You should be able to go head-to-head with
her!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer. It's not good to put that kind
of pressure on me, you know?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I guess I do need that kind of mindset if I
really want to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Nice Nature takes off with Mayano
Top Gun...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And manages to finish at the exact same time as
her running partner!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (Mayano and I... tied?)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No fair! Have you been practicing without me?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on. You practice when I'm not here too,
don't you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ah, I guess you're right! That's totally fair then! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the run! Now I know just how fast you
are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, Mayano Top Gun leaves the track.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That Mayano... She's a real cutie, and she shines
on the track too. The exact opposite of me,
wouldn't you say?
choice_data_list: You were shining back there too!
You were shining back there too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Thanks... I'm glad the supporting role could have
a good showing this time around.
choice_data_list:
Your mom will definitely be happy to see you
run like that!

Your mom will definitely be happy to see you
run like that!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, there you go again, making a big deal out of
everything!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (But, well... I hope that's true.)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(I want to show Mom that I'm doing well... Maybe
then she won't worry as much.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch Nice Nature gaze up at the sky,
something about her expression tells me she's
gained some confidence.
